---
description: Output JSON schema and file rotation specification for gitlode
applyTo: "src/core/types.ts,src/output/**"
---

# Output Schema Instructions

This file is a GitHub Copilot routing shim.

Canonical source:

- `packages/gitlode/docs/design/schema.md`

For related work, also read:

- `packages/gitlode/docs/usage.md` when user-facing examples or output behavior are affected
- `packages/gitlode/docs/design/cli.md` when CLI options influence output naming, rotation, or granularity
- `packages/gitlode/docs/design/plugins.md` when plugin extension fields are affected

Do not treat this file as an independent source of truth.
